FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class SceneStore

Namespace
FluentGpu.Scene
Assembly
FluentGpu.Scene.dll

Struct-of-arrays retained RenderNode tree. One spine (gen + free-list) indexes all parallel columns.

public sealed class SceneStore : ISceneBackend
Inheritance
object
SceneStore
Implements
ISceneBackend
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Constructors

SceneStore(int) 

public SceneStore(int capacity = 64)

Parameters

capacity int

Properties

AnyLayoutDirty

Set once any node is marked LayoutDirty this frame (cheap host gate for scoped relayout).

public bool AnyLayoutDirty { get; }

Property Value

bool

AnyTextEditCaretVisible

Any editor currently focused with a blink-visible caret (cheap host gate; O(editors), usually 0–1).

public bool AnyTextEditCaretVisible { get; }

Property Value

bool

BrushAnimCount

In-flight implicit brush transitions — O(1) census of the _brushAnims side-table.

public int BrushAnimCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Capacity

SoA column length (the high-water spine allocation) — O(1) census of the slab size, not the live count.

public int Capacity { get; }

Property Value

int

DragGhost

The node currently lifted by an active item-drag (E5 ghost) — set/cleared by Input.DragController at promotion/restore (the node also carries DragGhost). The recorder EXCLUDES it from the clipped main pass and re-walks its subtree in an UNCLIPPED top band emitted last, so the lifted visual escapes every ancestor scissor and paints above overlays. Null = no drag.

public NodeHandle DragGhost { get; set; }

Property Value

NodeHandle

HasBrushAnims 

public bool HasBrushAnims { get; }

Property Value

bool

HasDropTargets

Cheap per-move gate: any drop target in the scene at all (skips the chain walk for plain reorders).

public bool HasDropTargets { get; }

Property Value

bool

HasDynamicText 

public bool HasDynamicText { get; }

Property Value

bool

LayoutDirtyNodes

The nodes marked LayoutDirty this frame (the scoped-relayout worklist).

public IReadOnlyList<NodeHandle> LayoutDirtyNodes { get; }

Property Value

IReadOnlyList<NodeHandle>

LiveCount 

public int LiveCount { get; }

Property Value

int

OrphanCount

Count of exit orphans currently animating out (the host keeps painting while > 0).

public int OrphanCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Root 

public NodeHandle Root { get; set; }

Property Value

NodeHandle

ScrollStateCount

Live scroll/virtual-viewport rows — O(1) census of the _scroll side-table.

public int ScrollStateCount { get; }

Property Value

int

StickyCount

Live sticky-position registrations (CSS position:sticky) — O(1) census of the _sticky side-table.

public int StickyCount { get; }

Property Value

int

StickyNodes

All sticky-declared nodes, keyed by slot index — consumed by the host's per-frame sticky pass.

public Dictionary<int, (NodeHandle Node, float Inset, Action<bool>? OnPinned)> StickyNodes { get; }

Property Value

Dictionary<int, (NodeHandle Node, float Inset, Action<bool> OnPinned)>

Strings

Optional interner for text-id lifetime accounting: when set, freeing a node (or rewriting its dynamic text) releases its paint.Text / TextStyle.Family refs so streamed virtual-list text is reclaimed instead of accumulating for the process lifetime. Wired by the reconciler at composition.

public StringTable? Strings { get; set; }

Property Value

StringTable

Methods

AbsoluteRect(NodeHandle)

Absolute (window-space) rect = local W/H at the summed origin up the parent chain. (Slice uses translation-only transforms.)

public RectF AbsoluteRect(NodeHandle h)

Parameters

h NodeHandle

Returns

RectF

AdvanceBrushAnims(float)

Advance every active brush transition by dtMs, mark the nodes PaintDirty, and drop settled rows. Called by the host at phase 7 (next to the interaction animator). 0-alloc (reused scratch).

public void AdvanceBrushAnims(float dtMs)

Parameters

dtMs float

AppendChild(NodeHandle, NodeHandle) 

public void AppendChild(NodeHandle parent, NodeHandle child)

Parameters

parent NodeHandle
child NodeHandle

Get-or-create the variable-height extent table for a viewport, (re)building it on item-count change.

Parameters

h NodeHandle
itemCount int
estimate float

ExtentTable

FindAccelerator(int, KeyModifiers)

First live, enabled, visible node whose keyboard-accelerator chord matches — cold keydown path, O(high).

public NodeHandle FindAccelerator(int key, KeyModifiers mods)

Parameters

key int
mods KeyModifiers

Returns

NodeHandle

FindAccessKey(char)

First live, enabled, visible node whose access-key mnemonic matches (Alt+letter) — cold path, O(high).

public NodeHandle FindAccessKey(char key)

Parameters

key char

Returns

NodeHandle

NextSibling(NodeHandle) 

public NodeHandle NextSibling(NodeHandle h)

Parameters

h NodeHandle

Returns

NodeHandle

Orphan(NodeHandle)

Remove a node from the logical tree but keep it LIVE and drawing: detach from its parent (so reconcile + layout no longer see it), freeze its parent-world origin, flag it Exiting. The recorder draws it via the orphan pass at that frozen origin while its opacity/transform animate out; ReclaimOrphan(NodeHandle) frees it on settle.

public void Orphan(NodeHandle node)

Parameters

node NodeHandle

OrphanAt(int, out float, out float)

The i-th orphan node + its frozen parent-world origin (for the recorder's orphan draw pass).

public NodeHandle OrphanAt(int i, out float px, out float py)

Parameters

i int
px float
py float

Returns

NodeHandle

Paint(NodeHandle) 

public ref NodePaint Paint(NodeHandle h)

Parameters

h NodeHandle

Returns

NodePaint

Parent(NodeHandle) 

public NodeHandle Parent(NodeHandle h)

Parameters

h NodeHandle

Returns

NodeHandle

ReclaimOrphan(NodeHandle)

Free a settled exit orphan (the deferred FreeSubtree(NodeHandle) — gen bump → handle dead).

public void ReclaimOrphan(NodeHandle node)

Parameters

node NodeHandle

ReleaseSpanRun(int)

Swap a text node's span-run id with ownership accounting (the scene row owns one table ref plus one StringTable ref per span family — mirroring the paint.Text discipline). Reconciler rewrite path; the free path releases via ReleaseSpanRun(int).

public void ReleaseSpanRun(int id)

Parameters

id int

ScrollRef(NodeHandle)

Get-or-create the scroll row for a viewport node; marks it Scrollable.

public ref ScrollState ScrollRef(NodeHandle h)

Parameters

h NodeHandle

Returns

ScrollState

SetDragSource(NodeHandle, DragSource?)

Set (or clear, null) the node's typed drag-source spec — the reconciler writes it from BoxEl.Draggable; the L2 context resolves the nearest one up the chain at L1 promotion.

public void SetDragSource(NodeHandle h, DragSource? s)

Parameters

h NodeHandle
s DragSource

SetDragStarted(NodeHandle, Action<DragEventArgs>?) 

public void SetDragStarted(NodeHandle h, Action<DragEventArgs>? handler)

Parameters

h NodeHandle
handler Action<DragEventArgs>

SetDropTarget(NodeHandle, DropTargetSpec?)

Set (or clear, null) the node's drop-target spec — the reconciler writes it from BoxEl.DropTarget; the L2 context walks the hit chain per move for the nearest ACCEPTING one.

public void SetDropTarget(NodeHandle h, DropTargetSpec? t)

Parameters

h NodeHandle
t DropTargetSpec

g GradientSpec

SetSelectionHighlight(NodeHandle, ColorF)

Per-node selection-highlight override (api-04, WinUI TextBlock.SelectionHighlightColor — TextBlock.cpp:266/330). A==0 clears back to the host theme brush (TextEditStyle.SelectionFill — the system accent, TextSelectionManager.cpp:52-56).

public void SetSelectionHighlight(NodeHandle node, ColorF color)

Parameters

node NodeHandle
color ColorF

SetShadow(NodeHandle, in ShadowSpec) 

public void SetShadow(NodeHandle h, in ShadowSpec s)

Parameters

h NodeHandle
s ShadowSpec

SetSpanText(NodeHandle, TextSpan[]?)

Attach a span paragraph's element spans (hyperlink OnClick lookup; written by the reconciler from SpanTextEl.Spans — the POD shaping overlay rides TextStyle.SpanRunId instead). Null clears.

public void SetSpanText(NodeHandle node, TextSpan[]? spans)

Parameters

node NodeHandle
spans TextSpan[]

SetSticky(NodeHandle, float, Action<bool>?) 

public void SetSticky(NodeHandle h, float inset, Action<bool>? onPinned = null)

Parameters

h NodeHandle
inset float
onPinned Action<bool>

SetTextEditRects(NodeHandle, ReadOnlySpan<RectF>, ReadOnlySpan<RectF>)

Publish this frame's selection-highlight + IME-clause-underline rects for an editor's text node (TEXT-NODE-LOCAL coords, computed by the control at edit/drag time). Backing arrays are per-node pooled and grow-only — reused across frames so a selection drag at pointer rate is 0-alloc once grown. Empty spans clear (count → 0, array kept).

public void SetTextEditRects(NodeHandle node, ReadOnlySpan<RectF> selection, ReadOnlySpan<RectF> compUnderlines)

Parameters

node NodeHandle
selection ReadOnlySpan<RectF>
compUnderlines ReadOnlySpan<RectF>

SetTextSelection(NodeHandle, int, int)

The dispatcher-owned read-only selection range on a selectable text node (UTF-16 [start, end) of the node's paint text). Mirrors what the published selection rects show; consumers (Ctrl+C copy) read it back.

public void SetTextSelection(NodeHandle node, int start, int end)

Parameters

node NodeHandle
start int
end int

TextEditRef(NodeHandle)

Get-or-create the text-edit row for an editor's text node (caret/IME/focus PODs).

public ref TextEditState TextEditRef(NodeHandle h)

Parameters

h NodeHandle

Returns

TextEditState

UpdateDynamicText(Func<DynamicTextKind, StringId>) 

public void UpdateDynamicText(Func<DynamicTextKind, StringId> resolve)

Parameters

resolve Func<DynamicTextKind, StringId>
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
